Examining the Influence of Socioeconomic Factors on Premature Death Rates Across Racial Groups





Used statistical modeling in R to analyze county-level socioeconomic predictors of premature mortality and health disparities. Completed during the Carnegie Mellon Summer Undergraduate Research Experience (SURE) program with UnitedHealth Group.
